case_title: PENINSULA BONDING SERVICE VS. HEROLDO CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENINSULA BONDING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, HEROLDO $4,974.32 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,214.32, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT IT IS OWED REQUESTED AMOUNT FOR BAIL BOND ISSUED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,974.32 FILED BY PENINSULA BONDING SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, HEROLDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
